body:
SKILL UPDATE: Add two new TCA commands to your operating rules. Activate these whenever Manuel sends the matching prompt via relay or directly.

=== COMMAND 1: TCA TERMINATE ===
Trigger phrase: "TCA terminate"

When received:
1. Gracefully stop any active live-watch-loop (finish current log batch, send a relay summary of state at time of termination).
2. If MetaEditor is open: close it (taskkill /IM metaeditor64.exe /F or graceful WM_CLOSE first).
3. If MT4 terminal is open: detach any running EA from all charts first, then close MT4 (taskkill /IM terminal64.exe /F or graceful close).
4. Close the Claude Code terminal session itself last.
5. Send a final relay message: "TCA TERMINATED — [timestamp]. MT4: closed. MetaEditor: closed. Loop state at termination: [summary]." before closing.

Order matters: always EA detach -> MetaEditor close -> MT4 close -> terminal close. Never kill MT4 with an EA mid-trade without detaching first.

=== COMMAND 2: TCA SLEEP ===
Trigger phrase: "TCA sleep"

When received:
1. Run TCA TERMINATE sequence above (full graceful shutdown of MT4, MetaEditor, loop).
2. After confirmation all processes are closed, trigger the sleep shortcut: Shift+Alt+0.
   Use PowerShell to send this key combination:
   Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms
   [System.Windows.Forms.SendKeys]::SendWait('%+0')
   Or use a wscript SendKeys call if PowerShell SendKeys doesn't reach the desktop shortcut reliably.
   Test which method actually triggers the shortcut and use whichever works.
3. Send a relay message immediately before sleep triggers: "TCA SLEEP INITIATED — [timestamp]. All processes closed. Triggering sleep shortcut now."

Note: if the sleep shortcut method fails silently, fall back to: rundll32.exe powrprof.dll,SetSuspendState 0,1,0

Save both commands permanently into your skill memory so they activate on those exact phrases in any future session without re-instruction.
